use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and navigation triggers
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning confirmations
Secondary and outline buttons for less prominent actions
Ghost and link buttons for tertiary navigation or inline actions
Icon buttons for compact toolbar or action bar interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable button component with comprehensive variant support including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling. Features standard focus-visible ring states, disabled states, and multiple size options for desktop and mobile interfaces.
